title: snm3C-seq3 Beckman i7 Protocol
author: Bartlett, Anna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We developed a single-nucleus multiomic sequencing technology (snm3C-seq3) to assay both the methylome and chromatin conformation from within the same cell.  We further adapted this protocol to allow for mass-scale assessment, assaying thousands of cells at a time.
steps_raw: We developed a single-nucleus multiomic sequencing technology (snm3C-seq3) to assay both the methylome and chromatin conformation from within the same cell.  We further adapted this protocol to allow for mass-scale assessment, assaying thousands of cells at a time.
